exercises.title: Syndrome Calculator
tasks: Input a set of X errors on data qubits
Repeat for Z errors and X-syndrome
Visualize error pattern and resulting syndrome

exercises.title: Chain Builder
exercises.description: Build error chains from syndrome defects.
tasks: Find shortest path between defect pairs
hints: Use Manhattan distance for path finding
BFS or Dijkstra for shortest path
Multiple valid chains exist for each syndrome
Verify by recomputing syndrome from chain

exercises.title: Boundary Handler
tasks: Identify which boundaries are rough vs smooth
Compute distance from defects to each boundary
Determine if pairing to boundary is optimal
Handle corner cases with multiple boundary types
hints: X-chains can end at smooth boundaries
Z-chains can end at rough boundaries

exercises.title: 3D Syndrome Tracker
exercises.description: Track syndromes across multiple measurement rounds.
tasks: Maintain syndrome history over d rounds
hints: Store syndromes as list of 2D grids
Temporal pair: same space, different times
Spatial pair: same time, different spaces
Use XOR to find changes between rounds
